Article.ArticleTitle: Symplectic Radon Transform and the Metaplectic Representation.

Abstract.AbstractText: We study the symplectic Radon transform from the point of view of the metaplectic representation of the symplectic group and its action on the Lagrangian Grassmannian. We give rigorous proofs in the general setting of multi-dimensional quantum systems. We interpret the Radon transform of a quantum state as a generalized marginal distribution for its Wigner transform; the inverse Radon transform thus appears as a "demarginalization process" for the Wigner distribution.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Faculty of Mathematics (NuHAG), University of Vienna, Oskar-Morgenstern-Platz 1, 1090 Vienna, Austria.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: The author declares no conflict of interest.

Reference.Citation: Radon J. On the Determination of Functions from their Integrals along Certain Manifolds. Ber. Sachsige Akad. Wiss. 1917;69:262–277. doi: 10.1109/TMI.1986.4307775. (In German)
